calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1
Off Calendar Dec-01-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1
Off Calendar Sep-29-2025 Continued To Dec-01-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1
Off Calendar Aug-18-2025 Continued To Sep-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Amy Harrington appeared as Administrator in Pro Per (via Zoom).
Gabrielle Gomez appeared on behalf of Assignee Inheritance Funding Company (via Zoom).

The Court heard the petition to accept the resignation of the personal representative, approval of first and final account, for termination of estate administration, and for discharge of bond.

The Court noted that discharging Ms. Harrington without further action would leave the estate stagnant and proposed alternatives, including distributing the Fresno rental property subject to liens by the administrator and Inheritance Funding, or using the "primary residence" succession procedure. Ms. Harrington clarified the property was an inherited rental (not the decedent's primary residence), so the succession procedure did not apply. Counsel agreed distribution subject to liens was feasible and that a partition action would likely consume estate resources. Ms. Harrington agreed to amend the petition to seek distribution subject to liens.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to September 29, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow time for filing an amended petition.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR A Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-02-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-29-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Schroeder appeared by zoom for Inheritance Funding Company (petitioner).
Amy Harrington (proposed administrator) appeared by zoom in propria persona.

The court noted that no one appeared to claim their priority. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Amy Harrington is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $180,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for June 2, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
